---
title: "Microlearning"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Bite-sized 1-2 hour skill sessions"
description: "Focused 1-2 hour microlearning sessions for specific tools and technologies. Perfect for busy professionals who want to quickly learn a new skill or tool."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:55vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Micro<span style="color:#F5A623;">learning</span></h1>
    <p>Master a new tool in 1-2 hours. Focused sessions designed for busy professionals who value their time.</p>
    <a href="#sessions" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">Browse sessions</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">14</div><div class="m-nl">Sessions</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">1–2h</div><div class="m-nl">Per session</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">100%</div><div class="m-nl">Practical</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">3</div><div class="m-nl">Categories</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOOLS & SYSTEMS -->
<div class="m-s" id="sessions" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Tools & Systems</h2>
    <p class="sub">Pick a session, show up, leave with a new skill.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/cli-intro/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Unix CLI"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>Unix Command Line</h3><p>Essential commands, navigation, and shell scripting basics.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/tmux/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Tmux"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 hour</div><h3>Tmux</h3><p>Session management, panes, windows, and productivity shortcuts.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/emacs/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Emacs"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>Emacs Essentials</h3><p>Navigation, editing, buffers, and getting started with packages.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/sc-im/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="SC-IM"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 hour</div><h3>SC-IM Spreadsheets</h3><p>Terminal-based spreadsheets with formulas and data import.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/syncthing/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Syncthing"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>Syncthing</h3><p>Private, peer-to-peer file sync setup and configuration.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/libreoffice-calc/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="LibreOffice Calc"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>LibreOffice Calc</h3><p>Advanced formulas, data analysis, charts, and macros.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PUBLISHING & WRITING -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Publishing & Writing</h2>
    <p class="sub">Modern document tools for technical professionals.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/quarto/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Quarto"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>Quarto Publishing</h3><p>YAML, Markdown, code chunks, and multi-format output.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/org-mode/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Org-mode"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>Org-mode Fundamentals</h3><p>Note-taking, task management, agenda, and literate programming.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/latex/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="LaTeX"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>LaTeX for Academic Writing</h3><p>Document structure, equations, bibliographies, and packages.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-4 mt-1 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/typst/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Typst"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 hour</div><h3>Typst Markup Language</h3><p>Modern typesetting with simple syntax, math, and templates.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- OPERATING SYSTEMS -->
<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Operating Systems</h2>
    <p class="sub">Hands-on introductions to security-focused platforms.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/nixos/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="NixOS"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>NixOS</h3><p>Declarative config, packages, and rollbacks.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/freebsd/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="FreeBSD"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>FreeBSD</h3><p>Architecture, pkg, and ports collection.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/openbsd/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="OpenBSD"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>OpenBSD</h3><p>Security, pledge, PF firewall, and mitigations.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-3">
        <a href="/academy/microlearning/qubesos/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="QubesOS"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 hours</div><h3>QubesOS</h3><p>Compartments, domains, and secure workflows.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Learn something new<br>over lunch</h2>
    <p>Perfect for lunch-and-learn sessions, team building, or personal skill upgrades.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Book a session</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Quick reference guides &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Cheat sheets included &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Group packages
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
